name: agent-lens
description: Agent Lens skills — runtime debugging and browser recording for AI agents.

skills.name: agent-lens-mcp
skills.description: Agent Lens MCP tool reference. Load before invoking any mcp__agent-lens__* tool. Covers debug_*, chrome_*, and session_* namespaces with per-language references for Python, Node.js, Go, and Chrome.

skills.name: agent-lens-cli
skills.description: Agent Lens CLI reference. Load when invoking the agent-lens CLI binary. Covers all debug and browser subcommands, breakpoint syntax, output modes, and per-language setup.
